text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is distraught at being separated
from Satono Diamond, her lifelong friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio and Nice Nature are worried for their
younger friend and offer Kitasan Black their
assistance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a long discussion about whose tutelage she
would benefit most from, Tokai Teio and Mejiro
McQueen become her mentors.
